text: From: Pat To Kim Hi! Mum says I can go to the rock concert on Saturday. 0 It was really nice of / from you to invite me. 1 I've spent the whole of / from July practising on my guitar! 2 I downloaded some information about the band of/ from the internet. 3 Is the rock concert far of/ from the city centre? 4 The audience wil be full of / from students from our college! 5 Which type of / from instrument do you like most? 6 Ineed to get back home of / from the concert by 11 p.m. Bye for now!
